links.description: API Server is hosted by http module only, per diagram label.
HTTP module can create an HTTP server that listens to server ports and gives a response back to the client.
Client shown using multiple browsers (Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Opera, Safari) to access the UI server.
UI Server sends HTTP Response back to client.
UI Server sends HTTP Request to API Server (www.api.example.com).
UI Server depicted alongside Angular logo, implying UI server can be built with Angular.
UI Server depicted alongside React logo, implying UI server can be built with React.
API server depicted alongside Node.js + Express logos, implying it is built with Express.
API server depicted alongside Node.js + Express logos, implying it is built with Node.js.
Diagram shows Node.js + Express combined as the technology stack for API server.
